title: Italian Options Glitter Joy Wired Linen Christmas Ribbon, Wide, Hessian Ribbon for Crafts, Gift Wrapping Accessories, Wreaths, Tree Decorations, Burlap Fabric Borders, Green, Gold, 63 mm x 10 Metre
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: WIRED-EDGE RIBBON: This festive green linen ribbon is adorned with a glittery gold ‘Joy’ print, holly, and berries. Designed with a wired edge, it provides maximum hold and versatile styling options for decorative crafts and gift wrapping.

PREMIUM LINEN RIBBON: Measuring 63 mm x 10 metres, this extra-wide, high-quality, linen-textured craft ribbon has a charming woven pattern and wired edges. Soft yet structured, it’s fray-resistant and perfect for floral displays and handmade bows.

VERSATILE CRAFTS: A must-have for your craft supplies, these linen jute ribbons will elevate cosmetics, scented products, millinery, chocolates, gift wrapping, paper crafts, wreaths, bouquets, and hampers.
QUALITY ASSURANCE: At Italian Options, our decorative Christmas tree ribbons are manufactured to the highest standards, ensuring gift wrap and craft accessories that last.

ABOUT US: Founded in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company supplying premium craft supplies for over 38 years, including wedding favours, stationery, and decorations to help you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special moments.
description: Add a touch of refined festive charm to any craft project with our decorative wired-edge green linen Christmas joy ribbon. This linen-textured Christmas ribbon is decorated with a glittery gold 'Joy' print, holly, and berries with a wired edging designed to provide maximum hold and enhance your styling options, adding structure and sophistication to your creations. This seasonal ribbon is durable and versatile, ideal for a wide range of applications — from creating handmade bows, decorating gifts, wreaths, and hampers to embellishing craft projects — making every celebration unforgettable. Established in 1987, Italian Options is a family-run British company specialising in high-quality craft supplies and event decorations, helping you craft, create, and celebrate life’s special occasions — perfect for home crafters, DIYers, and event planners alike. Each wired-edge linen ribbon measures 63 mm in width and is supplied on a 10-metre roll.
